## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in a browser (logged food, checked rings, trends, recipes, settings)
- [ ] Checked on a narrow mobile viewport
- [ ] If calorie/macro/weight math changed, calories still reconcile (`kcal = P*4 + C*4 + F*9`)
- [ ] No new build step or framework added (kept it a single static `index.html`)
- [ ] Bumped the `sw.js` `CACHE` name if assets changed
